part.text:
The rename of `extractLabels` to `extractSwarmLabels` has been completed across the repository. All four method receivers (`Shared`, `SwarmProvider`, `Provider`, and `DynConfBuilder`) now use the new name `extractSwarmLabels`.

**Changes applied:**
- Renamed `Shared.extractLabels` → `Shared.extractSwarmLabels`
- Renamed `SwarmProvider.extractLabels` → `SwarmProvider.extractSwarmLabels`
- Renamed `Provider.extractLabels` → `Provider.extractSwarmLabels`
- Renamed `DynConfBuilder.extractLabels` → `DynConfBuilder.extractSwarmLabels`

**Updated files:**
- `shared_labels.go` - method definitions
- `pswarm.go` - call sites (SwarmProvider.parseService)
- `pdocker.go` - call sites (Provider.listContainers)
- `config.go` - call sites (DynConfBuilder.getIPAddress)
- `config_test.go` - test call sites

**Verification:**
- All 60 tests in `pkg/provider/docker` pass
- No compilation errors in the workspace (317 packages, 942 files)
- No remaining references to the old name `extractLabels`

The task is complete.
